products.title: PINBRIDGE
products.description: A secure offline-first vault app. Store, encrypt, and sync your sensitive data with zero cloud dependency. Your data stays yours.

products.title: AppLeo
products.description: A beautifully crafted baby tracking app. Monitor feeding schedules, sleep patterns, diaper changes, and milestones — all in one place.

products.title: Lena
products.description: A magical adventure game designed for young children. Choose your avatar, explore colourful worlds, and embark on a journey full of wonder.

products.title: Play Store Launch
products.description: Our mobile apps are being packaged and submitted to the Google Play Store. Stay tuned for native Android releases of Oryxen Labs products.

repositories.name: oryxen.github.io
repositories.description: The source code behind this very website. Open, clean, and fully static — HTML, CSS, JS, zero dependencies.

repositories.name: PINBRIDGE
repositories.description: Offline-first encrypted vault. Source code will be published as open source — follow @antoleod for updates.
